title: senna neglecta var. furnicola
intro: Senna neglecta var. furnicola is a lesser-known variety of the Senna plant, belonging to the legume family and native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which have been used traditionally to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Senna neglecta var. furnicola is often used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
